item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: Pardon the selfie - But I just wanted to share my joy
item.description: Trigger Warning: Talk about suicide Picture to the left is two years ago. Picture to the right is today. Two years ago, my life was miserable. I was very overweight, the dysphoria had become completely unbearable and I could no longer pretend to be something I wasn't. For me, dysphoria and thoughts about being born wrong was with me since my earliest memories. I struggled through a traumatic puberty, and tried to cure myself from something that can't be cured. I tried to be what the world wanted me to be. Two years ago, I was at a crossroads. Either be try to be myself in the world, or not be at all. I moved from the mountain village where I worked, closer to home and family, but still in a fairly large city. I started working two jobs, losing 35 kg and brought in enough capital to buy an apartment. Four months ago, I started hormone treatments, and I see a little progress every month. I no longer need wigs. My face no longer grows facialhair from a year and a half of laser. My body is starting to change to reflect what my brain was always wired for. My name is Kristianne. I have a wonderful girlfriend named Siri, who only sees the woman I am. I have new and wonderful friends. I have reconnected with old friends who have now met the real me. And, I'm mending the fractured bond I had with my family. I am a teacher to adult immigrants who need help to integrate. I am an aunt to three wonderful children. I am a big sister to three adult siblings, who should have been there for them all the time, but I am there now. I feel like I'm actually living, and not just surviving. I can feel again. I am no longer a husk. If you struggle with what I did. Take a chance. It won't fix all of your problems, of course. But, it might give you the surplus needed to start living fully and vibrantly. I still feel dysphoria, but it's less than before. I am only 4 months into the medical process and I am waiting for surgeries. But, just this hope, this chance, to spend the one and only life I have as myself. That is everything. Love you all. I love this community!
item.dc:creator: Krascara

item.title: Cows love scritches
item.description: https://www.gentlebarn.org/donate - Support the Gentle Barn by making a donation today! If you donate please comment @OP or message me so I can thank you! I love to Meme for Good and direct people to awesome nonprofits. Confirmed donation count: 0

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
what's the problem again?
i mean, accurate
i knew it
mmm hmm
this happens to me irl
nope, don't like that
shame about the pixels there
i concur
this happens to me at least 5 times a day at work
gonna take a while to talk to this dude
wow, i thought my neighborhood was the only one having this problem
and their amazing catalog of songs about california and california only
i guess
farimg
relatable
that's all for now.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Some things do get better
item.description: This is me. Some days it’s hard to keep going. Some days it’s nearly impossible to keep the depression and darkness at bay. But she… she is what keeps me going. I can’t do this without her. I can’t fathom losing her. I can’t exist in a world where she isn’t here with me. I have to be her. Have to pursue her. Have to do everything in my power to keep her. Because for once in my life I found something worth fighting for. And she is everything to me. Apologies for the selfies, it’s not something I normally post. But I’m finding I don’t hate my face anymore. Not like I used to. And that’s… that’s a nice change. Most Viral Edit: You all have made me feel so special. I've genuinely cried reading your comments. Would that my own family and some of my oldest friends were as welcoming and accepting. For everyone out there struggling, for the trans men and women and non-binary folx, never hesitate to reach out to me. I can't promise I'll be able to make the pain go away, but I can weep over it with you.
item.dc:creator: SapphosGambit

item.title: I slept like a rock last night.
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: Over a year ago, I posted this stupid meme when it all started. Today, we launched the book.
item.description:
Old meme is cringe, long live new meme.
Today we released the PDF version and we're shipping the physical book from next week. Shameless plug, you can order a copy from our website if you want: https://palaeogames.com/ Take a look at some of our art, if you'd like:
These illustrations are by Mark Witton. He's a pretty cool guy. This is Balaur - watch out for its dual sickle claws.
One of our custom playable races, the Manyhorn. Specifically, a Barbarian, Conan style!
We added a bunch of holistic environments too. These are Beipiaosaurus in the chilly mountains of the Yixian Formation. Who said dinosaurs can only be in Aztec-themed jungles?
It has been a very strange year for me. I have the same hair style as Michael here too.
item.dc:creator: Palaeo

item.title: A collected list...
item.description:
They all look like their moms dressed them so they could go out and play. You can still hear her yelling at them to bring up their dishes from the basement before they leave.
I'm sure there's more but this is a good start. (originally posted by @amipretty on 2022-12-04 18:54:26)

item.title: It is not "caging kids" vs "open border"
item.description:
Immigration gets flattened into a two dimensional issue: do you believe in caging kids or in an open border? The reality is our economy needs immigrants. We can’t grow without them
But, the politics spook Republicans and Democrats. So we’ve gone decades without real action. https://www.instagram.com/reel/Cvubuvvg6lI/

item.title: Please wait patiently for memes
item.description:
You can't make me
Not a meme but well deserved
Mary Shelley invented sci-fi, in case you were confused
I like tortoises
Gotta stay hydrated
I made them play D&D together once and it went ok
hehe
Please ?
What would Pike say?
I read this in his voice and now so did you
Not even mentioning the centaur stack
Birb
I love cartoon villains who are actually ok sad dudes. Gotta be one of my favorite genders.
Hug a goose today.
Silly juice stops the feels
*incoherent murmblings*
Shoulda been named 'Bort'
plamt
Please don't go out without the proper clothing, especially if you're a sexy witch. You are in short supply. Hypothermia is no joke.
Please ?
item.dc:creator: BenjyX55

item.title: In a world where you can be anything, be kind…
item.dc:creator: aerrorfree

item.title: Wedding Catwoman Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here, wanted to share my cosplay of Catwoman in her wedding dress (as seen in Batman 50). Every other cat in this edit is ALSO me! Clearly I have a problem.
This is the original art featuring other variations of Catwoman.
Here’s a composite by my amazing friend BriLanImagery— those two photos were taken separately and he combined them in such a cool way.
And this is the reference I sent him. Even though the wedding never happened, all the art out of it was absolutely gorgeous. I still love BatCat and I worship Selina Kyle.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum
